archetype: Archetype 5: Jewel & Luxury + Archetype 7: Electric & Neon (Refined Cyber Premium)

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode A) for Sectors and Services. Asymmetric overlapping sections for Hero.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-aligned content inside centered or full-width bento boxes.

components.buttons: Glassmorphism with glowing border on hover. text-white bg-white/5 border border-white/10 hover:border-blue-500/50 hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,212,255,0.4)] transition-all
components.cards: Tracing Beam effect or Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/5 border border-white/10).
components.header: Sticky with backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#05060F]/60 border-b border-white/5
components.chatbot: Floating widget, glowing violet/blue pulse effect. Uses Lucide 'Bot' icon.

motion.page_load: Staggered fade up for grid items
motion.scroll: Parallax on background, opacity fade-in for sections

portfolio_images.description: Fine dining plating representing a high-end restaurant site
Fashion model representing an e-commerce platform
Doctor in modern office representing a medical app

specific_requirements.languages: Multilingual support (FR, EN, AR, Darija) based on browser, with manual switcher.
specific_requirements.chatbot_domain: Claude Sonnet 4.5 restricted to Krypton services.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use framer-motion for all scroll reveals and staggered grid loading.
Do NOT use standard Shadcn looking cards. Use custom bento grids with glassmorphism or 1px white/10 borders on a solid very dark background.
The hero section should have the abstract neon background very subtle (opacity 20-30%) with the glowing particle effects.
Use Lucide-React icons and apply a neon drop-shadow to them using Tailwind 'drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(0,212,255,0.8)]' or similar.
Make the floating WhatsApp and Chatbot buttons prominently glow.
Integrate multilingual text placeholders or a simple i18n structure.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Do NOT use space grotesk. Use Unbounded and DM Sans.
